title: callista jerdoniana
intro: Callista jerdoniana, also known as the Jerdon's Callista, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Callista jerdoniana include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
